text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Heh-heh. I've got me some special spice today,
Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Well, I'm feelin' a little better than usual. What is
it people say again? I've got a pop in my step
today?
choice_data_list: You mean you've got pep in your step?

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Ah, that's the one! I've got some pep in my step!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
If I lose again like last time, it'll give all my fans
the blues.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
I'll come out of this race the winner and throw
everybody a big, happy party!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Anybody who gets in my way is goin' down with a
bang! These legs of mine'll blast them away!
